attributes.title: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Cluster Overview
attributes.description: High-level health and performance overview of the Redis Enterprise cluster, covering database status, node infrastructure, and key operational KPIs.

params.markdown:
## [Redis Enterprise OTel] Cluster Overview

Top-level health view of the Redis Enterprise cluster:
- Database and node availability status
- Aggregate operations throughput and latency
- Memory utilisation across databases
- Connection counts and eviction activity
- Infrastructure CPU and memory trends

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS bdb_status = MAX(bdb_up) BY bdb
| STATS databases_up = SUM(bdb_status), total_databases = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS bdb_status = MAX(bdb_up) BY bdb
| STATS databases_up = SUM(bdb_status), total_databases = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS node_status = MAX(node_up) BY node
| STATS nodes_up = SUM(node_status), total_nodes = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS node_status = MAX(node_up) BY node
| STATS nodes_up = SUM(node_status), total_nodes = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ops = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY bdb
| STATS total_ops_per_sec = SUM(avg_ops)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ops = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY bdb
| STATS total_ops_per_sec = SUM(avg_ops)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_latency)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = avg_latency * 1000

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_latency)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = avg_latency * 1000

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem = AVG(bdb_used_memory) BY bdb
| STATS total_memory = SUM(avg_mem)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem = AVG(bdb_used_memory) BY bdb
| STATS total_memory = SUM(avg_mem)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_conns = AVG(bdb_conns) BY bdb
| STATS total_connections = SUM(avg_conns)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_conns = AVG(bdb_conns) BY bdb
| STATS total_connections = SUM(avg_conns)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_evicted_objects IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_evictions = AVG(bdb_evicted_objects) BY bdb
| STATS total_evictions = SUM(avg_evictions)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_evicted_objects IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_evictions = AVG(bdb_evicted_objects) BY bdb
| STATS total_evictions = SUM(avg_evictions)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_shards_used IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_shards = AVG(bdb_shards_used) BY bdb
| STATS total_shards = SUM(avg_shards)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_shards_used IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_shards = AVG(bdb_shards_used) BY bdb
| STATS total_shards = SUM(avg_shards)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_latency) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_latency) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops_per_sec = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops_per_sec = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL AND bdb_memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS used_memory = AVG(bdb_used_memory), memory_limit = AVG(bdb_memory_limit) BY bdb
| EVAL utilization_pct = ROUND((used_memory / memory_limit) * 100, 1)
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL AND bdb_memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS used_memory = AVG(bdb_used_memory), memory_limit = AVG(bdb_memory_limit) BY bdb
| EVAL utilization_pct = ROUND((used_memory / memory_limit) * 100, 1)
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_hits IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = AVG(bdb_read_hits), misses = AVG(bdb_read_misses) BY bdb
| EVAL hit_rate = ROUND((hits / (hits + misses)) * 100, 1)
| SORT hit_rate ASC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_hits IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = AVG(bdb_read_hits), misses = AVG(bdb_read_misses) BY bdb
| EVAL hit_rate = ROUND((hits / (hits + misses)) * 100, 1)
| SORT hit_rate ASC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = node_cpu_user + node_cpu_system
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(cpu_used) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = node_cpu_user + node_cpu_system
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(cpu_used) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_free_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS free_memory = AVG(node_free_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_free_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS free_memory = AVG(node_free_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS Status = MAX(bdb_up), `Avg Latency (s)` = AVG(bdb_avg_latency), `Ops/sec` = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec), `Used Memory` = AVG(bdb_used_memory), `Memory Limit` = AVG(bdb_memory_limit), Connections = AVG(bdb_conns), `Shards Used` = AVG(bdb_shards_used) BY bdb
| EVAL `Memory %` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Used Memory` / `Memory Limit`) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `Avg Latency (s)` = COALESCE(`Avg Latency (s)`, 0.0), `Ops/sec` = COALESCE(`Ops/sec`, 0.0), `Used Memory` = COALESCE(`Used Memory`, 0), `Memory Limit` = COALESCE(`Memory Limit`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), `Shards Used` = COALESCE(`Shards Used`, 0)
| SORT bdb ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS Status = MAX(bdb_up), `Avg Latency (s)` = AVG(bdb_avg_latency), `Ops/sec` = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec), `Used Memory` = AVG(bdb_used_memory), `Memory Limit` = AVG(bdb_memory_limit), Connections = AVG(bdb_conns), `Shards Used` = AVG(bdb_shards_used) BY bdb
| EVAL `Memory %` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Used Memory` / `Memory Limit`) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `Avg Latency (s)` = COALESCE(`Avg Latency (s)`, 0.0), `Ops/sec` = COALESCE(`Ops/sec`, 0.0), `Used Memory` = COALESCE(`Used Memory`, 0), `Memory Limit` = COALESCE(`Memory Limit`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), `Shards Used` = COALESCE(`Shards Used`, 0)
| SORT bdb ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = COALESCE(node_cpu_user, 0.0) + COALESCE(node_cpu_system, 0.0)
| STATS Status = MAX(node_up), `CPU Used (cores)` = AVG(cpu_used), `Free Memory` = AVG(node_free_memory), `Available Memory` = AVG(node_available_memory), `Ephemeral Storage` = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail), `Persistent Storage` = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail), Connections = AVG(node_conns), Requests = AVG(node_total_req) BY node
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `CPU Used (cores)` = COALESCE(`CPU Used (cores)`, 0.0), `Free Memory` = COALESCE(`Free Memory`, 0), `Available Memory` = COALESCE(`Available Memory`, 0), `Ephemeral Storage` = COALESCE(`Ephemeral Storage`, 0), `Persistent Storage` = COALESCE(`Persistent Storage`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), Requests = COALESCE(Requests, 0)
| SORT node ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = COALESCE(node_cpu_user, 0.0) + COALESCE(node_cpu_system, 0.0)
| STATS Status = MAX(node_up), `CPU Used (cores)` = AVG(cpu_used), `Free Memory` = AVG(node_free_memory), `Available Memory` = AVG(node_available_memory), `Ephemeral Storage` = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail), `Persistent Storage` = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail), Connections = AVG(node_conns), Requests = AVG(node_total_req) BY node
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `CPU Used (cores)` = COALESCE(`CPU Used (cores)`, 0.0), `Free Memory` = COALESCE(`Free Memory`, 0), `Available Memory` = COALESCE(`Available Memory`, 0), `Ephemeral Storage` = COALESCE(`Ephemeral Storage`, 0), `Persistent Storage` = COALESCE(`Persistent Storage`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), Requests = COALESCE(Requests, 0)
| SORT node ASC
| LIMIT 100
